text.en: AlexNet made deep convolutional networks the center of modern computer vision by winning ImageNet 2012 with a large margin. GPU training, ReLU activations, data augmentation, and dropout made scale visible.
text.zh: AlexNet 以巨大优势赢得 ImageNet 2012，使深度卷积网络成为现代计算机视觉的中心。GPU 训练、ReLU 激活、数据增强和 dropout 共同展示了规模化训练的力量。

text.en: ImageNet Classification with Deep Convolutional Neural Networks
text.zh: 使用深度卷积神经网络进行 ImageNet 分类
